items.title: Bug: Company logo thumbnails enter corrupted render state after job application, stale DOM / z-index collision across job card components
items.description:
# Company thumbnails overlap other job cards after applying to a posting

Hey team,

I've been noticing a consistent visual bug on the platform. Every time I apply to a job posting, the company logo/thumbnail from that job bleeds over into the other job cards in the feed. Sometimes it stacks on top of the adjacent card's logo, sometimes it straight up replaces it. It looks pretty broken.

The weird part is that it fixes itself the moment I do a hard refresh. So the data coming from the backend seems fine, this is purely a client-side rendering issue.

## Repro

1. Go to the job listings feed.
2. Apply to any job.
3. Come back to the listings (back nav or closing the apply modal).
4. The thumbnails on nearby job cards are now messed up; wrong logos, overlapping, stacked, etc.
5. Refresh the page → everything goes back to normal.

This happens every single time, not intermittent. I've tried it across a few different browsers (Chrome and Firefox) and it's the same behavior.

## What I think is going on

I'm a software engineer so I poked around in devtools a bit. A few things that might be worth looking at:

**Key prop issue on the list**: If the job card list is keyed by array index instead of something stable like `job.id`, React's reconciler will reuse DOM nodes incorrectly when the list state changes after applying. This would explain why the thumbnails get "shifted" onto wrong cards. Classic React anti-pattern.

**Stacking context / z-index leak**: When the apply flow triggers (modal, overlay, toast, whatever), it might be setting `position: absolute` or bumping `z-index` on the applied card's thumbnail. If that style isn't cleaned up properly (maybe an animation callback that doesn't fire?), the image escapes its container and sits on top of siblings. Throwing `overflow: hidden` and `position: relative` on the card container would contain this.

**Race condition on refetch**: If applying fires off a POST and then the feed revalidates in parallel (SWR `mutate()`, React Query `invalidateQueries()`, etc.), there's a window where partial/stale data gets rendered before the fresh response lands. The thumbnails might be getting swapped around during that intermediate state.

**Image caching**: Less likely, but if there's a custom image component or service worker caching thumbnails by position/index instead of URL, a re-render after apply could serve the wrong cached image to the wrong card.

## Quick fix suggestions

- Check that `key={job.id}` (or whatever unique identifier) is used on the card list, not `key={index}`.
- Make sure each card's thumbnail container has its own stacking context (`position: relative; overflow: hidden;`).
- If the apply action triggers a list refetch, batch the state update or wrap it in `startTransition` so you don't get an intermediate broken frame.
- Audit `useEffect` cleanups around the apply modal/overlay, something might not be resetting styles on unmount.

## Environment

- Chrome 124  on macOS
- Desktop, standard resolution
- Happens on both fast and slow connections so it's not a network timing thing

Not a blocker since refresh fixes it, but it makes the platform look buggy and I'd imagine it's hurting trust with less technical users who don't know to just reload. Happy to provide more details or screen recordings if that helps.

items.title: [Remoto] Fullstack Developer Sênior na Sensedia
items.description:
<!-- 
==================================================
POR FAVOR, SÓ POSTE SE A VAGA FOR PARA FRONT-END!

!!! Temos 4 regrinhas básicas: https://git.io/JG3Z9 !!!

Não faça distinção de gênero no título da vaga.

Use: "Front-End Developer" ao invés de 
"Desenvolvedor Front-End" \o/

Exemplo: `[São Paulo] Front-End Developer na NOME DA EMPRESA`
==================================================
-->

## Nossa empresa

A Sensedia é líder no mercado de APIs, oferecendo soluções de integração e consultoria a grandes empresas no Brasil e no mundo, em uma variedade de setores. Seu portfólio, além de uma plataforma API Management, inclui Sensedia Integrations, Service Mesh, API Adaptive Governance, Events Hub, Open Banking & Finance e equipes estratégicas de Professional Services.

Trabalhar aqui é pertencer a uma cultura plural, descontraída e inovadora. É para quem tem coragem de ir além, pensar e agir fora da caixa. Preferimos pedir desculpas ao invés de pedir permissão e estamos sempre dispostos a nos transformar, nos reinventar.
Nossas pessoas são incríveis e você pode fazer parte disso tudo. Nos comprometemos em garantir um ambiente de trabalho acolhedor e respeitoso.

## Descrição da vaga
-Ajudar outras pessoas do time com dúvidas de negócio e tecnologia;
-Ajudar tech lead com pequenas alterações em documentação e processos;
-Destreza para falar com o cliente de forma clara e segura;
-Tomar iniciativa para resolver questões do dia a dia do time;
-Participação de ritos com nossos clientes;
-Interação com o time para compreensão da solução de negócio e técnica;
-Levantamento das atividades técnicas;
-Implementação de APIs e microsserviços

## Local
Vaga 100% remota

## Requisitos
-HTML5, Css e Javascript/Typescript
-React e Styled Components
-Java (frameworks Springboot, Spring Cloud e Java reativo)
-Experiência no desenvolvimento de BFFs com Node.js
-Conhecimento de bancos relacional (Oracle/SQL) e não relacional (Mongo)
-Conhecimento de mensageria (RabbitMQ e Azure Service Bus)
-Testes automatizados (preferencialmente com Jest)
-Conhecimento de boas práticas de desenvolvimento, como: SOLID, Design Patterns, Clean Code e MFE

**Desejáveis:**
- Javascript/Typescript
- React 

**Diferenciais:**
-Conhecimento em Salesforce
-Experiência no desenvolvimento de bibliotecas de frontend
-Idiomas Inglês e Espanhol


## Benefícios

Vale Refeição/Vale Alimentação (Cartão Flash benefícios), Plano de Saúde, Plano Odontológico, Seguro de Vida, PPR, TotalPass, Auxílio Creche, Programa Well-Being (destinado para saúde física e mental), Universidade Corporativa (nossa #SensediaAcademy), com diversas trilhas de desenvolvimento; Parceiros culturais e educacionais, com descontos especiais; Somos uma empresa cidadã,  proporcionando licença maternidade e licença paternidade estendida.

**Diferenciais:**
Temos #WorkWhereYouBelong como proposta de valor, que é um modelo flexível de trabalho que nos ajuda a aumentar o senso de pertencimento dos Sensediers.
Trabalhe onde você pertence, porque as barreiras físicas estão menores, e o sentimento é de que exista apenas uma Sensedia em qualquer lugar que você esteja trabalhando.

## Contratação

Modelo de contratação CLT

## Candidatura

https://sensedia.hire.trakstar.com/jobs/fk0zurg/

## Tempo médio de feedbacks

Costumamos enviar feedbacks em até 15 dias após cada processo.


## Labels
<!-- retire os labels que não fazem sentido à vaga -->

#### Nível
- Sênior

items.title: [Remoto] DBA Pleno na Coodesh
items.description:
## Descrição da vaga: Esta é uma vaga de um parceiro da plataforma Coodesh, ao candidatar-se você terá acesso as informações completas sobre a empresa e benefícios. Fique atento ao redirecionamento que vai te levar para uma url [https://coodesh.com](https://coodesh.com/jobs/dba-pleno-123558695?utm_source=github&utm_medium=programadores-br-geral&modal=open) para realizar a candidatura. 👋 A TruckPag é uma startup inovadora no setor de Meios de Pagamento, focada em solucionar grandes desafios e gerar impacto relevante no mundo logístico. Buscamos profissionais talentosos e motivados que queiram tornar as operações logísticas mais efetivas, assertivas e competitivas. Acreditamos que grandes ideias nascem da diversidade de vivências, formações e pessoas únicas. Cultivamos um ambiente de trabalho colaborativo, de alta performance e descontraído, onde você terá a oportunidade de agregar valor significativo à nossa equipe e aos nossos produtos. Estamos em busca de uma pessoa **DBA Pleno** para se juntar ao nosso time de tecnologia. Você terá um papel estratégico na garantia da saúde, performance e segurança dos nossos bancos de dados, que estão 100% hospedados na nuvem utilizando AWS RDS. Nós já contamos com um parceiro responsável pelo monitoramento 24x7 da infraestrutura. Portanto, seu foco principal será atuar preventivamente, realizar _tuning_ avançado, gerenciar nosso ambiente legado e atuar a quatro mãos com os times de desenvolvimento para criar as melhores soluções em arquitetura de dados e queries. **Responsabilidades e Atribuições:** * Administrar, manter e otimizar nossos bancos de dados **PostgreSQL** e **SQL Server** (ambiente legado) hospedados no **AWS RDS**. * Realizar _database tuning_, identificando gargalos de performance, otimizando o uso de recursos e garantindo a escalabilidade do ambiente. * Prestar consultoria e apoio técnico constante aos desenvolvedores na construção e otimização de _queries_, modelagem de dados e criação de índices. * Acompanhar e analisar as notificações e alertas gerados pela nossa empresa parceira de monitoramento 24x7, atuando na resolução de incidentes quando necessário. * Gerenciar e validar políticas de backup, _restore_ e estratégias de alta disponibilidade (HA) e _Disaster Recovery_ (DR) dentro do ecossistema AWS. * Garantir as melhores práticas de segurança e controle de acessos. ## TruckPag:

Somos uma empresa de meios de pagamento especializada em gestão de frotas, com nosso cartão TruckPag, o cliente abastece com economia, facilidade e total controle. Com a CIOTPag, o cliente tem soluções completas para a sua gestão de frete a partir da emissão de CIOT e pagamento eletrônico de frete (PEF) . Além disso, a PagPedágio possibilita que as viagens sejam bem mais rápidas, sem precisar enfrentar filas de pedágios, em todo território nacional.

Somos 100% TruckPag: sem bancos, sem fundos, sem intermediadores e sem burocracia.

Veja mais no site ## Habilidades: - AWS RDS - PostgreSQL - SQL SERVER - Disaster Recovery ## Local: Remota ## Requisitos: - Experiência sólida e comprovada atuando como DBA, com domínio em PostgreSQL e bons conhecimentos em SQL Server. - Vivência prática com bancos de dados em nuvem, especificamente com Amazon RDS. - Forte conhecimento em performance tuning, análise de planos de execução e otimização de consultas pesadas. - Experiência prévia trabalhando próximo a times de engenharia/desenvolvimento de software. - Habilidade para atuar na resolução de problemas (troubleshooting) de forma ágil e analítica. ## Diferenciais: - Conhecimento em outras soluções do ecossistema AWS (CloudWatch, IAM, EC2). - Vivência com ferramentas de versionamento de banco de dados (ex: Flyway, Liquibase). - Experiência com migração de dados ou transição de sistemas legados. - Certificações AWS ou certificações oficiais em PostgreSQL/SQL Server. ## Como se candidatar: Candidatar-se exclusivamente através da plataforma Coodesh no link a seguir: [DBA Pleno na TruckPag](https://coodesh.com/jobs/dba-pleno-123558695?utm_source=github&utm_medium=programadores-br-geral&modal=open) Após candidatar-se via plataforma Coodesh e validar o seu login, você poderá acompanhar e receber todas as interações do processo por lá. Utilize a opção **Pedir Feedback** entre uma etapa e outra na vaga que se candidatou. Isso fará com que a pessoa **Recruiter** responsável pelo processo na empresa receba a notificação. ## Labels #### Alocação Remoto #### Regime PJ #### Categoria Banco de Dados

items.title: 🚨 Board is stale — scraper may have stopped
items.description:
## 🚨 Automated Alert: Board is Stale

The watchdog detected that `docs/jobs.json` has not been updated in **93 minutes**.

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Last updated | `2026-03-18T01:05:29Z` |
| Stale for | 93 minutes |
| Update cycle | Every 5 minutes |

## What to check

1. **Actions tab**: Is the `Update New Grad Jobs` workflow failing? Check [Actions](https://github.com/ambicuity/New-Grad-Jobs/actions/workflows/update-jobs.yml)
2. **Branch protection**: Did a new ruleset get added that blocks direct push?
3. **Scraper errors**: Is the scraper producing 0 jobs (all sources failing)?

## Auto-close

Close this issue once the board is confirmed fresh again.

*Filed automatically by the Board Freshness Watchdog workflow.*

We are now looking for a Software QA Development Engineer; you will collaborate with multi-functional groups and be responsible for test planning, execution, and reporting, you will also write scripts to automate testing, design and develop tools for QA team, or develop integration tests for validation. 

What you’ll be doing: 
• Review product requirements and develop test matrix. 
• Build test plan, design test case, execute and report test progress, bugs, and results to management. 
• Automate test cases and assist in the architecture, crafting and implementing of test frameworks. 
• Manage bug lifecycle and co-work with inter-groups to drive for solutions. 
• In-house repro and verify customer issues/fixes. 

What we need to see: 
• 2+ years QA experience. 
• Proficient in Unix/Linux and shell/python programming skills. 
• Rich experience in test cases development, tests automation in API/UI and failure analysis. 
• Solid experience with AI development tools, including creating test cases, automating test cases
• Good knowledge and hands-on experience in model testing and LLM benchmarking 
• Good QA sense including attention to detail, problem-solving, data analysis, quality standards knowledge, time management etc. 
• Excellent communicator, fluent written and verbal English.

items.title: [Beginner]: expand infrastructure keyword coverage for network automation, NOC, and network performance roles
items.description:
### 🐥 Beginner Friendly
Welcome! This is a **Beginner Issue** — a natural next step after Good First Issues.

It expects you to:
- Read existing code and follow its patterns
- Own a small implementation decision
- Write or extend tests

**Difficulty:**
- Basic Python (reading and writing functions) required
- No external API experience needed
- Familiarity with the contribution workflow expected

> [!IMPORTANT]
> We recommend completing at least one Good First Issue before attempting a Beginner Issue.
>
> **You must be assigned before starting** — comment `/assign` to claim this issue.
> PRs submitted without a prior assignment will be closed.

> [!TIP]
> **You should be comfortable with:**
> - Forking, branching, committing, and opening a PR without a tutorial
> - Reading Python code you did not write and following its patterns
> - Running `make test` and fixing failures before pushing
> - Rebasing onto `main` to resolve merge conflicts

### 👾 Description of the Issue
The current `infrastructure_sre` keyword list in `scripts/update_jobs.py` includes `network engineer`, but it misses several networking titles that are common in entry-level infrastructure hiring and already show up in real boards:

- `network automation engineer`
- `network performance engineer`
- `noc engineer`
- `network operations engineer`

That creates a quality gap where networking roles can fall into `other`, even though the project README explicitly says the board tracks network-focused roles.

Update `CATEGORY_PATTERNS['infrastructure_sre']['keywords']` so these titles are classified consistently, and add tests that prove the behavior.

Look at:

- `scripts/update_jobs.py`
- `tests/test_categorize.py`
- live references in `docs/jobs.json` such as SpaceX networking roles

Do not create a brand-new top-level category for this task. The goal is better classification within the existing `Infrastructure & SRE` bucket.

**Before claiming:**
- Check the issue labels to see what area this touches
- Review the CodeRabbit AI plan for a rough implementation overview
- If this feels like too big a step, try a Good First Issue first

### ✅ Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Networking titles listed above classify to `infrastructure_sre`
- [ ] The change is implemented in `scripts/update_jobs.py`
- [ ] All existing tests pass (`make test`)
- [ ] New tests are added covering the changed behavior
- [ ] PR is linked to this issue with `Fixes #<number>`
- [ ] PR title follows Conventional Commits format

### 🏗️ Which area does this touch?
🤖 Core scraper (scripts/update_jobs.py)

items.title: CoverGo - Senior Full Stack Engineer (.Net, Vue/React) - Remote/Hybrid (HCMC) - FT
items.description:
## Location

* HCMC, Vietnam (Hybrid)
* Remote

## Salary Expectation

* Negotiable

## Requirements
* 6+ years of Software Engineering experience (focus on complex SaaS applications)
* Proficiency in .NET Core and C#
* Expertise in Vue.js or React
* Experience with GraphQL and MongoDB/PostgreSQL
* Strong knowledge of Docker and Cloud platforms (AWS/Azure/GCP)
* Mastery of Test-Driven Development (TDD) and Domain-Driven Design (DDD)

## Skills

### Must Have

* Ability to architect scalable and efficient software solutions
* Experience on complex SAAS applications
* Excellent problem-solving and proactive troubleshooting skills
* English proficiency (to work in an international environment)

### Ideally

* Experience in the Insurtech or Fintech industry

### Responsibilities

* Design and implement scalable SaaS features based on insurance business requirements.
* Work across the full stack to build cohesive and efficient software solutions.
* Collaborate with cross-functional teams to translate technical concepts into seamless user experiences.
* Optimize performance to handle large datasets and high user traffic.
* Review code and write tests to ensure high quality and platform reliability.
* Investigate and fix bugs promptly to maintain system stability.
* Ensure security and compliance when handling sensitive customer data.
* Stay updated with new tech to keep the platform innovative and competitive.
* Architect for scalability to accommodate a growing number of clients and users.
* Mentor junior developers to support their technical growth and team contributions.

### Why it would be awesome to work with us

* Competitive renumeration package
* International Environment
* 13th month salary
* 15 days annual leave, 10 sick leave
* Annual Performance Bonus
* Company activities and events
* Learning and development plan

Website: https://covergo.com/

Email: giang.builam@covergo.com

LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/covergo/posts/?feedView=all

Careers: https://apply.workable.com/covergo/?lng=en

* Senior Full Stack Engineer (.Net, Vue/React) - Fully Remote: https://apply.workable.com/covergo/j/CA6C355073/

items.title: [HCMC, Onsite] Quality Control
items.description:
JD –  Quality Control
Key Responsibilities
Perform manual testing on Web and Mobile applications.


Read and analyze requirement specifications, identify unclear or inconsistent content, and coordinate clarification.


Build Test Plans, write Test Cases, Test Scenarios, and execute tests.


Prepare SRS documents when required.


Set up and maintain the testing environment.


Record, manage, and verify defects (bugs).


Report testing results to the QC Team Lead and Project Manager (PM).


Communicate directly with internal teams and clients on issues arising during the testing process.



Requirements
For Experienced Candidates:
Bachelor’s degree in IT or related fields.


Minimum 2 years of experience testing Web and Mobile applications.


Solid IT knowledge and familiarity with at least one programming language.


Hands-on experience with REST APIs and Performance Testing.


Ability to write SQL queries for data validation.


Good English (or Japanese) reading comprehension (TOEIC 550+).


Experience with Automation Testing and scripting is a plus.


Strong time management skills and proactive working attitude.


For Fresh Graduates / Junior Candidates:
Bachelor’s degree in IT or related fields.


Basic IT knowledge and familiarity with at least one programming language.


Good English (or Japanese) reading comprehension (TOEIC 450+).


Detail-oriented with strong logical thinking.


Proficiency in JavaScript with experience in at least one framework/library (e.g., jQuery, AngularJS, ReactJS, …).


GPA 6.0 or higher (please attach transcripts in your CV).



🔹 Benefits:
Salary: Up to 30m++ (based on capability) + 13th-month salary + Tết bonus.


 Healthcare Insurance.


Modern equipment (MacBook, iPhone).


Benefits: Team building, Happy Hours, dynamic and young environment.


 Clear career development path with professional growth opportunities.



📩 Apply Now
 Email: hr@gontech.asia
 Please specify [Quality Control] + [Your Full Name] in the subject line.

items.title: [HCMC, Onsite] AI DATA PYTHON
items.description:
📍 Location: HB Tower, 699 Điện Biên Phủ Street, Ward 25, Bình Thạnh District, HCMC
 ⏰ Working Hours:
Monday – Friday: 08:30 – 18:00 (Lunch break: 12:00 – 13:30)


Saturday: 08:30 – 12:30 (Work From Home)
 👤 Direct Manager: Project Manager / Senior Management



Overview
We are seeking a highly skilled and motivated AI/ML Engineer to join our AI Assistant Platform team.
In this role, you will design, develop, and deploy advanced AI/ML models and services that power intelligent features, natural language processing, and real-time inference.
You’ll collaborate closely with platform engineers, data scientists, and cloud architects to ensure AI solutions are scalable, reliable, and deeply integrated into our intelligent applications.

Key Responsibilities
Design and develop scalable AI/ML solutions and production-ready models for core AI Assistant capabilities (e.g., natural language understanding, generation).
Own the end-to-end lifecycle of AI/ML models, from initial experimentation and training to testing, validation, and deployment in production environments.
Architect and optimize ML infrastructure across distributed cloud environments (AWS, GCP, or Azure) to support high-throughput, low-latency inference.
Implement robust model monitoring, versioning, and performance optimization frameworks (e.g., drift detection, A/B testing) to maintain model integrity and quality.
Partner with backend engineers to integrate AI/ML services with the AI Assistant core platform.
Enforce model fairness, security, and performance best practices across the entire ML lifecycle.
Required Skills & Qualifications
Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Machine Learning, or a related quantitative field.
2+ years of experience in AI/ML engineering, machine learning, or software development with a strong focus on AI.
Proficiency in Python and popular ML libraries (e.g., PyTorch, TensorFlow, Scikit-learn) for model development and prototyping.
Strong experience with MLOps practices and tools (e.g., MLflow, Kubeflow, Sagemaker) for automating the model development and deployment pipeline.
Deep understanding of machine learning algorithms, model training, and evaluation techniques.
Experience with cloud-based compute and ML services (e.g., AWS SageMaker, Google AI Platform, Azure ML).
Expertise in productionizing and scaling AI/ML models in a high-traffic, low-latency production environment.
Excellent analytical, problem-solving, and communication skills.
Preferred Qualifications
Proven experience with Large Language Models (LLMs), Natural Language Processing (NLP), or Computer Vision applications.
Hands-on experience with vector databases, RAG architectures, and fine-tuning LLMs.
Knowledge of containerization and orchestration tools (Docker, Kubernetes).
Ability to work cross-functionally in Agile or fast-paced R&D environments.
Good to have experienced with Agentic AI application.
Why Join Us
Play a pivotal role in building the AI models and services for a next-generation AI Assistant Platform.
Collaborate with a world-class team of AI, data, and platform engineers on cutting-edge technologies.
Contribute to a scalable architecture that supports real-time AI experiences across industries.
What We Offer
💰 Competitive salary & performance-based bonus + 13th-month salary + holiday/Tết bonuses.
🏥 Healthcare Insurance.
💻 Modern equipment (MacBook, iPhone).
🎯 Team building, Happy Hours, dynamic and young work environment.
📚 Clear career path with opportunities for professional development.
📩 Apply Now
Email: hr@gontech.asia

items.title: [HCMC, Onsite] Senior Backend Developer Python
items.description:
Senior Backend Engineer (Python)
📍 Location: Bình Thạnh, Ho Chi Minh City
 🕒 Working model: Full-time
 👤 Reports to: Tech Lead / Engineering Manager

 Job Summary
We are looking for a highly skilled Senior Backend Engineer (Python) to join our engineering team. You will play a key role in designing, building, and optimizing backend systems that are scalable, secure, maintainable, and aligned with long-term product strategy.
 You will also mentor junior engineers, participate in architectural discussions, and contribute to solving complex technical challenges across the platform.

 Responsibilities
Take full ownership and show strong commitment to every task, from development to deployment
Proactively report progress, and planned tasks, and blockers to the team.


Work closely with Design, Frontend, and QC teams to deliver features that meet both business and technical requirements.


Ensure high code quality by following Clean Code, linting standards, Conventional Commit rules, and ensuring all QC test cases are passed.


System Design & Development
Design, build, and optimize backend architecture for scalability, performance, security, maintainability, and reliability.


Develop and maintain RESTful APIs, WebSocket, and Server-sent Event
Participate in system improvement initiatives and contribute ideas for architectural enhancement.


Leadership & Mentorship
Review code, provide feedback, and mentor junior/mid-level engineers.


Share best practices, guidelines, and technical knowledge with the team.



 Requirements
Education
Bachelor’s degree or currently pursuing a degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field. Students are welcome to apply


Experience


Ability to read and apply English technical documentation.


Experience working in Agile/Scrum environments is a plus.
Having experience in building, maintaining and operating AI applications is a plus"
Technical Skills
Strong experience with Python, Django, FastAPI and familiarity with modern AI-assisted development tools.


Solid understanding of software design principles:


OOP, Design Patterns


Event-driven Architecture


Microservices


Message Queue systems


Clean Architecture


Database experience:


MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis


schema design, query optimization, indexing, performance tuning


Hands-on experience with:


RESTFul API, or GraphQL API, or gRPC API development


Websocket/Server-sent event


Git, Docker, CI/CD pipelines


Unit testing frameworks: pytest, unittest


Message queues: RabbitMQ, Kafka, Azure Service Bus


Strong understanding of backend security and performance best practices.



 Nice to Have


Packaging & distribution experience: seed data, licensing/subscriptions, install wizards.


Integration experience with datamart/reporting systems: ClickHouse, Metabase, Power BI.


Strong understanding of web security (OWASP ASVS), RBAC/SoD, object-level permission models.


🔹 Benefits
  Salary : Up to $1500 
 85% salary during probation.


 Attractive salary package, including 13th-month bonus.


 Provided with MacBook & iPhone 16e.


 Premium healthcare package.


 Monthly Happy Hour & annual company trips.


 Opportunity to improve English skills with international clients.


 Exposure to new tech stacks for business growth.


 Flexible working hours & attractive annual leave policy.



📩 Apply Now
 Zalo :+84 966 012 405
 Email: hr@gontech.asia
 Please specify [POSITION] + [FULL NAME] in the email subject line.
